questionHtml: Cladistics and other evolutionary evidence suggest that mammals and birds have a more recent common ancestor than mammals and amphibians. Draw a cladogram to show the relationships between mammals, birds and amphibians.
markschemeHtml: What is important is that the proper relationships are shown not the style used.

meta.title: Cladistics and other evolutionary evidence suggest that mammals and birds have a more recent common ancestor than mammals and amphibians. Draw a cladogram to show the relationships
